# AlloFlow — WCAG 2.2 Success-Criterion Coverage

<!-- GENERATED by dev-tools/gen_wcag_coverage.cjs — do not edit by hand; re-run after changing the fix registry. -->

This table maps every automated repair AlloFlow's document-remediation pipeline performs to a WCAG 2.2 success criterion. The **Automated** column is generated directly from the live `SURGICAL_TOOL_REGISTRY` in `doc_pipeline_source.jsx` (each repair tool carries its own `wcag:` tag), so it cannot drift ahead of the code — re-run `node dev-tools/gen_wcag_coverage.cjs` after adding a tool.

## Honest summary

Of the **21** WCAG 2.2 A/AA criteria that meaningfully apply to a *static remediated document*:

- **12** have a dedicated automated repair tool (✅ Automated) — 34 tools across 13 criteria.
- **6** are satisfied structurally by how the output is built (🏗️ Structural — e.g. reading order from the PDF struct-tree, reflowable semantic HTML).
- **3** still need human review (✍️ Manual — e.g. "don't rely on color/shape alone"); AlloFlow flags but cannot reliably auto-repair these.
- **30** apply only when the document contains the relevant content (◐ forms, media, or interactive HTML).

The remaining **5** A/AA criteria do not apply to a static document. Interactive criteria are marked **Conditional**, because HTML exports can contain forms, media, annotation tools, or other controls — they are listed below as N/A rather than counted as gaps, because counting them would understate coverage dishonestly.

> **This is a self-reported capability map, not a conformance claim.** Per-document PDF/UA-1 conformance is checked independently by veraPDF (`dev-tools/verapdf_diff.cjs`, gated in `verify_all`); WCAG verification is the axe-core (Deque) deterministic axis plus a multi-pass AI self-consistency review. A criterion marked "Automated" means AlloFlow *attempts a repair* for it, not that every document passes it. Independent validation (veraPDF / PAC 2024 / a human audit) is always recommended for compliance-sensitive use.

### Principle 1: Perceivable

| SC | Name | Lvl | Status | How |
|----|------|-----|--------|-----|
| 1.1.1 | Non-text Content | A | ✅ Automated | fix_alt_text, fix_image_decorative, fix_svg_accessibility |
| 1.2.1 | Audio-only and Video-only (Prerecorded) | A | ◐ Conditional | only when the document embeds audio/video; AlloFlow transcribes media blocks |
| 1.2.2 | Captions (Prerecorded) | A | ◐ Conditional | media blocks only |
| 1.2.3 | Audio Description or Media Alternative | A | ◐ Conditional | media blocks only |
| 1.2.4 | Captions (Live) | AA | — N/A | live media — not applicable to a static document |
| 1.2.5 | Audio Description (Prerecorded) | AA | ◐ Conditional | media blocks only |
| 1.3.1 | Info and Relationships | A | ✅ Automated | fix_heading, fix_figcaption, fix_table_caption, fix_th_scope, fix_table_header_row, fix_table_header_col, fix_table_mark_layout, fix_table_merge_row, fix_table_unmerge_cell, fix_aria_label, fix_add_landmark, fix_remove_empty_heading, fix_list_wrap, fix_complex_table, fix_add_nav, fix_add_aside, fix_add_header, fix_add_footer |
| 1.3.2 | Meaningful Sequence | A | 🏗️ Structural | reading order is set by the PDF struct-tree build + linear HTML |
| 1.3.3 | Sensory Characteristics | A | ✍️ Manual | requires human review (no reliable automated repair) |
| 1.3.4 | Orientation | AA | 🏗️ Structural | reflowable HTML does not restrict display orientation |
| 1.3.5 | Identify Input Purpose | AA | ◐ Conditional | forms only |
| 1.4.1 | Use of Color | A | ✍️ Manual | requires human review (no reliable automated repair) |
| 1.4.2 | Audio Control | A | — N/A | auto-playing audio — not applicable to a static document |
| 1.4.3 | Contrast (Minimum) | AA | ✅ Automated | fix_contrast, fix_color_contrast |
| 1.4.4 | Resize Text | AA | 🏗️ Structural | output is reflowable semantic HTML (relative units) |
| 1.4.5 | Images of Text | AA | 🏗️ Structural | image-of-text is OCR-extracted to real text during intake |
| 1.4.10 | Reflow | AA | 🏗️ Structural | semantic HTML reflows; no fixed two-dimensional layout is emitted |
| 1.4.11 | Non-text Contrast | AA | ✍️ Manual | requires human review (no reliable automated repair) |
| 1.4.12 | Text Spacing | AA | ✅ Automated | fix_text_spacing |
| 1.4.13 | Content on Hover or Focus | AA | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only; requires runtime and manual review |

### Principle 2: Operable

| SC | Name | Lvl | Status | How |
|----|------|-----|--------|-----|
| 2.1.1 | Keyboard | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only; verify every function by keyboard |
| 2.1.2 | No Keyboard Trap | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only; requires runtime keyboard testing |
| 2.1.4 | Character Key Shortcuts | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls with shortcuts only |
| 2.2.1 | Timing Adjustable | A | — N/A | time limits — not applicable to a static document |
| 2.2.2 | Pause, Stop, Hide | A | — N/A | moving content — not applicable to a static document |
| 2.3.1 | Three Flashes or Below Threshold | A | ◐ Conditional | animated or embedded media only; requires manual review |
| 2.4.1 | Bypass Blocks | A | ✅ Automated | fix_iframe_title, fix_skip_nav |
| 2.4.2 | Page Titled | A | ✅ Automated | fix_title |
| 2.4.3 | Focus Order | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only; requires runtime keyboard testing |
| 2.4.4 | Link Purpose (In Context) | A | ✅ Automated | fix_link_text |
| 2.4.5 | Multiple Ways | AA | — N/A | site-level navigation |
| 2.4.6 | Headings and Labels | AA | 🏗️ Structural | descriptive headings via fix_heading / fix_remove_empty_heading + AI heading review |
| 2.4.7 | Focus Visible | AA | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls; sanitizer restores a visible baseline, runtime review required |
| 2.4.11 | Focus Not Obscured (Minimum) | AA | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only; WCAG 2.2 runtime/manual review |
| 2.5.1 | Pointer Gestures | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only |
| 2.5.2 | Pointer Cancellation | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only |
| 2.5.3 | Label in Name | A | ◐ Conditional | forms/controls only |
| 2.5.4 | Motion Actuation | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only |
| 2.5.7 | Dragging Movements | AA | ◐ Conditional | drag-enabled HTML only; a non-drag alternative must be verified |
| 2.5.8 | Target Size (Minimum) | AA | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only; axe WCAG 2.2 plus manual exception review |

| SC | Name | Lvl | Status | How |
|----|------|-----|--------|-----|
| 3.1.1 | Language of Page | A | ✅ Automated | fix_lang |
| 3.1.2 | Language of Parts | AA | ✅ Automated | fix_lang_span |
| 3.2.1 | On Focus | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only |
| 3.2.2 | On Input | A | ◐ Conditional | interactive HTML controls only |
| 3.2.3 | Consistent Navigation | AA | ◐ Conditional | multi-page or repeated-navigation HTML only |
| 3.2.4 | Consistent Identification | AA | ◐ Conditional | repeated interactive components only |
| 3.2.6 | Consistent Help | A | ◐ Conditional | HTML exports containing repeated help mechanisms only |
| 3.3.1 | Error Identification | A | ◐ Conditional | forms only |
| 3.3.2 | Labels or Instructions | A | ✅ Automated | fix_input_label |
| 3.3.3 | Error Suggestion | AA | ◐ Conditional | forms only |
| 3.3.4 | Error Prevention (Legal, Financial, Data) | AA | ◐ Conditional | transactional forms only |
| 3.3.7 | Redundant Entry | A | ◐ Conditional | multi-step forms only; WCAG 2.2 runtime/manual review |
| 3.3.8 | Accessible Authentication (Minimum) | AA | ◐ Conditional | authentication flows only; normally outside a remediated document |
| 3.1.4 | Abbreviations | AAA | ✅ Automated | fix_abbreviation |

### Principle 4: Robust

| SC | Name | Lvl | Status | How |
|----|------|-----|--------|-----|
| 4.1.1 | Parsing | A | ✅ Automated | fix_duplicate_id |
| 4.1.2 | Name, Role, Value | A | ✅ Automated | fix_button_name |
| 4.1.3 | Status Messages | AA | ◐ Conditional | dynamic HTML controls only |

---

**Legend** — ✅ Automated: a `fix_*` surgical tool repairs it · 🏗️ Structural: satisfied by how the accessible output is constructed · ✍️ Manual: applies but needs human judgment · ◐ Conditional: applies only when relevant forms, media, or interactive HTML are present · — N/A: interactive-web criterion, not meaningful for a static document.
